title: Anu Koshal to lead National Tax Disputes and Tax Litigation Group
content:
## Anu Koshal to lead National Tax Disputes and Tax Litigation Group
We are pleased to announce that Anu Koshal , partner in our Toronto office, has assumed the role as Lead of our National Tax Disputes and Tax Litigation Group within the Firm’s Tier 1-ranked National Tax Group .
In recent years, Anu has been at the centre of some of Canada’s most complex and precedent-setting tax disputes, advising major corporations and financial institutions on their most challenging tax litigation matters. His practice is distinguished by sustained involvement in contested proceedings of significant scale and sensitivity, reflecting the level of trust clients place in his experience and advocacy.
Over the same period, our National Tax Disputes and Tax Litigation Group has expanded immensely in size and in the complexity and profile of matters it handles, reflecting its increasingly prominent presence.
“As Lead of National Tax Disputes and Tax Litigation, Anu will continue to play a central role in advising our clients on their most complex and high-stakes tax disputes,” said Raj Juneja , Co-Head of our National Tax Practice Group. “His experience and judgment have made him a trusted advisor to clients facing precedent-setting issues, and this role reflects the importance of that work to our national platform.”
Brett Anderson , Co-Head of our National Tax Group and Regional Managing Partner for Alberta, added, “Businesses turn to our tax disputes team for clear, practical advice on matters that often have significant implications on their operations. Anu’s appointment ensures continuity and consistency in how we support them across jurisdictions.”
Anu has taught trial advocacy at the University of Toronto Faculty of Law and is a frequent author and speaker on litigation topics for organizations, including the Tax Executives Institute, the Canadian Tax Foundation and the Canadian Petroleum Tax Society. A dedicated mentor, he was named the Firm’s Mentor of the Year in 2025.
Anu is repeatedly recognized as a leading lawyer by Chambers Canada , ITR World Tax , The Canadian Legal Expert Directory , and Lexpert Special Edition: Litigation and Best Lawyers in Canada . He is an active member of the Canadian Tax Foundation, the Advocates Society, the Canadian Bar Association, the Ontario Bar Association, the American Bar Association, and the South Asian Bar Association.
Anu’s appointment reflects the Firm’s ongoing focus on delivering consistent, high-quality advocacy across complex tax disputes nationwide, supported by the largest tax team of any law firm in Canada.
Our National Tax Group is distinguished by the range and depth of its capabilities. We continue to expand and deepen our service offering across Canada to provide clients with the full range of advisory, transactional and litigation services.
McCarthy Tétrault’s tax expertise and knowledge of Canada’s tax regime are widely recognized. Our team is distinguished by its winning combination of exceptional experience in tax planning and tax disputes, making us a formidable presence in the courtroom and the boardroom. Helping clients navigate the tax aspects of domestic and cross-border public and private mergers and acquisitions, corporate reorganizations, financings and securitizations, and other transactions, we bring clarity and pragmatism to complicated tax issues that could otherwise derail business goals. We also guide clients through the entire gamut of tax controversies, from audits, requests for information and objections to searches and seizures and appeals. In working with us, clients gain a team with experience on some of the most complex tax issues and precedent-setting cases across the country. Learn more about our National Tax Group.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
- Anu Koshal Partner, Lead, National Tax Disputes and Tax Litigation People.Offices.Singular Toronto
